gates.title: Public GitHub Repository
gates.approval_required: Explicit approval is required before creating a public repository or pushing files.
gates.next_safe_action: Review the publication command plan and hold until the public repository decision is explicit.
gates.verification: After approval, confirm the public URL opens, then rerun URL validation and the submission packet validator.

gates.title: Public Demo Video
gates.approval_required: Explicit approval is required before recording, uploading, or making the video public.
gates.next_safe_action: Review the video readiness report and command plan, then record only after the screen safety check is complete.
gates.verification: Confirm the uploaded video is public, under 3 minutes, and does not expose private screens or overclaim live Splunk MCP proof.

gates.title: Optional Live Splunk / MCP Proof
gates.approval_required: Completed for local official-MCP proof. Further production/Cloud proof would require separate explicit approval.
gates.next_safe_action: Use the completed readback in the video and Devpost copy, bounded to local Splunk Enterprise Docker with synthetic data.
gates.verification: Review the official MCP readback file and rerun claim-boundary validation.

gates.title: Approved URL Writeback
gates.approval_required: Explicit approval is required before writing verified public URLs into local submission artifacts.
gates.next_safe_action: Wait until the public repository and demo video URLs are real, public, and read back.
gates.verification: Run prepare_submission_urls.py with both approved URLs, then rerun URL validation and final copy export.

gates.title: Devpost Final Submission
gates.approval_required: Explicit final approval is required before using a Devpost session, saving a draft, or pressing submit.
gates.next_safe_action: Wait for public repo and video URLs, write approved URL evidence only after approval, then review final copy.
gates.verification: Confirm approved public URLs, safe claim wording, selected track, architecture evidence, and final submit readback.

recommended_order: Review this Submission Gate Ledger and the External Approval Packet.
Approve or hold public GitHub publication.
Approve or hold public demo video recording/upload.
Optionally approve live Splunk/MCP proof if the bonus path is worth the account and credential work.
After public URLs are approved, write approved URL evidence locally and rerun validation.
Only then request final Devpost submit approval.
non_action_boundary: This ledger is advisory only. It does not create a repo, upload a video, create accounts, configure credentials, write approved URLs, update Devpost, or submit anything.
